news.headline: Inflation remains elevated, says Fed's Daly.
Timor-Leste telecoms market report reveals progress with first international submarine cable link, aiding economy and infrastructure rebuilding.
news.summary: A recent report on the Timor-Leste (East Timor) telecoms market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's catalog. Timor-Leste is making strides with its initial international submarine cable connection as part of efforts to revitalize its economy and reconstruct vital infrastructure, such as telecom networks that suffered damage during periods of conflict. This development indicates progress in the restoration of the country's telecom sector, reflecting its ongoing efforts towards economic recovery and modernization.

news.headline: Inflation cools as Fed's preferred measure shows moderation, signaling economic downshift. Fed nears inflation goal.
news.summary: As Federal Reserve officials edge towards curbing inflation, there are signs of the economy slowing down and price increases stabilizing.

news.headline: Cinesteam's new secondary dressing effectively absorbs unwanted smells from malodorous wounds, improving quality of life for caregivers and patients.
news.summary: Malodors from wounds are frequently overlooked in patient care, despite being prevalent. Cinesteam has developed a new secondary dressing that efficiently absorbs unpleasant odors. The breakthrough product was announced on June 28, 2024, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Emphasizing the significance of patient quality of life in long-term care, this innovation aims to address a crucial aspect of wound management.

news.headline: Fed's Daly predicts AI's potential to enhance productivity; cautions speculation due to early stage.
Fed's Daly: Prepared to respond if we see inflation drop like it did last year.
CEOs express uncertainty to Fed; lack confidence.
Fed's Daly: Policy outlook uncertain at this time.
Official: Policies can be altered if inflation drops or job market weakens, says Fed's Daly.
HBA introduces $100K Pitch Competition for Women Innovators in Healthcare, boosting female founders' access to capital.
news.summary: In an effort to combat funding disparity, the Healthcare Businesswomen's Association (HBA) based in Fairfield, N.J., revealed on June 28, 2024, the introduction of a groundbreaking Pitch Competition tailored for female entrepreneurs in healthcare. This initiative aims to offer women in this sector more opportunities to secure capital and access critical resources essential for their business growth. This competition marks a significant milestone for the HBA and their dedication to empowering women in the industry, potentially affecting a substantial number of female founders within healthcare.

news.headline: Aspen Laser & TheraLight expand HQ by 7,500 sq. ft in Lindon, Utah. Companies specialize in photomedicine.
news.summary: LINDON, Utah - On June 28, 2024, Aspen Laser Systems, LLC, and TheraLight, LLC, two U.S.-based medical device companies focused on photomedicine, announced the expansion of their headquarters with an additional 7,500 square feet. The companies, operating jointly, are privately held and continue to grow their presence in the industry.

news.headline: Daly: Inflation is tapering, policy on track - CNBC.
Daly from Fed says more action ahead as PCE data shows positive signs.
Fed's Daly sees positive impact of PCE data on policy, indicating success in implementation.
Fed official notes that policy effectiveness is increasing despite longer timeframe for results.
Fed's Daly warns of potential need for prolonged high rates if inflation remains persistent or decreases slowly.
TFG expands services to help communities nationwide with legislative and funding needs. Announcement made on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: TFG has announced a strategic alignment to advance its goal of supporting communities across the country. In a press release on June 28, 2024, TFG revealed plans to bolster its Advocacy, Grants, and Consulting services. This move is aimed at enhancing their impact on a larger scale.

news.headline: FERTILIMIN supplement boosts female health - tackles PCOS & reproductive health. PRNewswire, June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A new supplement, made from food-based ingredients, aims to support women in managing Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) and improving reproductive health. Launched in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on June 28, 2024, this product targets the crucial aspect of female reproductive health. It is designed to aid women dealing with issues related to their ovaries and reproductive system, whether or not they are planning to conceive. This supplement could potentially benefit a large number of women, providing them with natural support for PCOS and reproductive well-being.

news.headline: CDC recommends Merck's pneumonia vaccine, Capvaxive, for adults 65+ and those 19-64 with certain conditions.
news.summary: On Thursday, the U.S. CDC's ACIP unanimously recommended Merck & Co Inc’s Capvaxive, the Pneumococcal 21-valent Conjugate Vaccine, for adults 65 years and older. Also known as the pneumonia vaccine, the recommendation is for a single dose of Capvaxive for adults 65 years and older who have not had a pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, and adults 19-64 years with certain medical conditions. This news is significant for public health as it aims to protect vulnerable populations, with Merck & Co Inc's stock ticker being NYSE: MRK.

news.headline: Arctic Blue offers sustainable Omega-3 fish oil supplements; prioritizing quality and environmental concerns.
news.summary: Amid growing global environmental worries, a Dutch company's sustainable and high-quality Omega-3 fish oil supplements have garnered attention. In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on June 28, 2024, it was highlighted that the quality of Omega-3 supplements plays a crucial role, alongside their sustainability. This Dutch brand's products stand out for offering both aspects, meeting the increasing demand for environmentally friendly options.

news.headline: Arctic Blue fish oil supplement eliminates bloating, burps, and fishy aftertaste issues. Reported on June 28, 2024 in Fort Lauderdale, Fla.
news.summary: Consumers often experience bloating, burps, and a fishy aftertaste when taking Omega-3 fish oil supplements. However, Arctic Blue has found a solution to these issues. In a recent report dated June 28, 2024 from Fort Lauderdale, Florida, it was highlighted that fish oil supplements are popular for providing essential fatty acids like Omega-3. Arctic Blue aims to address common concerns associated with such supplements, offering a unique approach to eliminate the discomfort experienced by many. This news emphasizes the importance of finding alternatives to tackle the challenges faced by consumers when taking Omega-3 fish oil supplements.

news.headline: Fed's preferred inflation gauge, PCE, falls to 2.6% in May from 2.7% in April, showing early signs of consumer demand cooling. Markets expect Fed rate cuts.
news.summary: The Personal Consumption Expenditure, the Federal Reserve's favored inflation measure, decreased in May as projected by economists. This solidifies market anticipation for future Fed rate cuts. Personal income saw a higher increase than expected in May, while personal spending grew less than predicted, hinting at a potential decline in consumer demand. Inflation, as measured by the PCE price index, dropped from 2.7% in April to 2.6% in May, aligning with the consensus estimate. This data suggests a moderation in consumer price growth.

news.headline: Aris Mining increases ownership in Soto Norte Gold-Copper Project to 51% after acquiring 31% interest.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 28, 2024, Aris Mining Corporation (TSX: ARIS) (NYSE-A: ARMN) revealed the closure of the purchase of a further 31% stake in the Soto Norte gold-copper project. This acquisition follows a previous announcement made on May 23, 2024.

news.headline: Pickleball Kingdom expands to American Fork, Utah, its second location in the state, largest indoor entity globally.
news.summary: In American Fork, Utah on June 28, 2024, Pickleball Kingdom, the world's biggest indoor pickleball organization, revealed its newest venture into the area. This marks the second franchise announcement in Utah by Pickleball Kingdom and emphasizes its growth in the region.

news.headline: GradGuard advises 18M college students to protect investments in higher ed. Ensure safety in college life - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Approximately 18 million college students and their families are being advised to assess the potential dangers associated with college living. GradGuard, a leading expert in aiding educational institutions in informing and safeguarding students against such risks, suggests that individuals in college...

Blackstone Mortgage Trust (NYSE: BXMT) to release Q2 2024 earnings on July 24, 2024, and host conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In New York, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) disclosed it will release its second quarter 2024 earnings presentation on its website, www.bxmt.com, and submit its Form 10-Q before the market opens on Wednesday, July 24, 2024. The Company plans to conduct a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. Those interested in the webcast can sign up via this link: https://event.webcasts.com/starthere.jsp?ei=1678028&tp_key=56a32bd9f3

news.headline: Investor recounts losing $100K in crypto hack, feeling his heart would stop.
news.summary: Matthias Mende was struck with intense fear and shock when he discovered that he had lost $100,000 in cryptocurrency to a hacker. He described feeling like his heart would cease beating upon this realization as he recounted the harrowing experience to Cointelegraph.

news.headline: Subex included in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for AI in CSP Customer and Business Operations report in India.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India on June 28, 2024, Subex, a top global provider of AI-driven solutions for the telecommunications sector, revealed its selection in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for AI in CSP Customer and Business Operations report. This recognition is a testament to Subex's expertise in the field and signifies its continuous growth in the industry.

news.headline: SYNEVIT extends supplement shelf life using pharmaceutical-grade packaging, degrading slower than competitors.
news.summary: A company in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, has a strong dedication to using pharmaceutical-grade packaging for its supplements, ensuring they degrade at a slower rate compared to similar products on the market. This commitment was highlighted on June 28, 2024. These supplements, while able to keep for a long time, can gradually lose potency over time. This strategy allows the company to maintain product quality and effectiveness over a longer period, providing consumers with reliable products backed by the brand’s emphasis on high-quality packaging.

news.headline: Public art project in Orange County honors women health advocates and pandemic heroes. Reshaping democracy, justice, and health equity in 2020.
news.summary: A new public art project in Santa Ana, California launched on June 28, 2024, to honor "Promotoras" health advocates and American heroes of the pandemic. This initiative comes in the wake of significant events in 2020, addressing challenges in democracy, justice, and health equity. The project aims to pay tribute to these individuals through art installations and various forms of creative expression.

news.headline: US PCE Price index meets expectations, Core PCE MoM revised up, Consumer Spending falls below estimates.
Splash Box Marketing achieves 2024 Great Place To Work Certification with 100% employee satisfaction.
news.summary: In Hendersonville, Tennessee on June 28, 2024, Splash Box Marketing has achieved certification from Great Place To Work®, highlighting their commitment to employee satisfaction. The recognition is solely determined by feedback from current staff members, with a remarkable 100% of employees expressing that Splash Box is an excellent workplace.

news.headline: O'Shaughnessy Ventures awards $100,000 grant for microbiome health monitoring device Nurfy by Dr. Mariam Elgabry.
news.summary: Awarded by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV), Dr. Mariam Elgabry will utilize her newly received grant to develop Nurfy, the inaugural AI-enhanced device designed to facilitate at-home monitoring of microbiome health. The grant was recently secured on June 28, 2024, in Greenwich, Conn. This innovation marks a significant advancement in health technology, enabling individuals to closely track their microbiome health conveniently from their living spaces.

news.headline: Easy Street Offers is expanding into 9 new states on June 30, 2024, connecting agents and investors for real estate transactions.
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona - On June 28, 2024, Easy Street Offers, a leading online marketplace linking real estate agents and property investors for cash transactions, has revealed its expansion into nine additional states. The expansion includes Colorado, Georgia, Florida, Indiana, and Kansas, among others. This move signifies a substantial growth for the platform, as it now covers a total of [mention specific number] states nationwide.

news.headline: International sister city representatives commend the launch of Weifang Bohai International Communication Center on June 26, 2024.
news.summary: In Weifang, China, a significant event took place on June 26, 2024. The Weifang Bohai International Communication Center was inaugurated in a ceremony co-hosted by China Daily and Weifang City. The launch was reported by the Shandong Office of Hong Kong Business Daily. This collaborative project signifies a step towards enhanced communication and collaboration in the region. It serves as a hub for international interactions and is expected to boost economic and cultural exchanges. The event drew attention from various stakeholders with a keen interest in business and media sectors. The Weifang Bohai International Communication Center is set to play a pivotal role in facilitating connections, with potential impacts on industries and partnerships locally and abroad.

news.headline: New election prediction model by Brown University students, 24cast.org, outperforms industry leaders with transparency.
news.summary: Revolutionary machine learning technology is transforming election forecasting with a strong emphasis on transparency. Recently launched by Brown Political Review, 24cast.org is a cutting-edge election prediction platform. This innovative tool utilizes advanced algorithms to predict election outcomes with unprecedented accuracy. By leveraging state-of-the-art machine learning techniques, 24cast.org aims to set new standards in election forecasting by providing transparent and reliable predictions. This platform is a game-changer in the field, offering users a reliable source for understanding future election results. With its launch on June 28, 2024, 24cast.org is poised to revolutionize the way election predictions are made, ushering in a new era of data-driven decision-making.

news.headline: Robotic therapy, SPINDLE, developed by GIST researchers in South Korea, improves daily activities for individuals with tremors.
news.summary: GWANGJU, South Korea - On June 28, 2024, the launch of SPINDLE was announced, a groundbreaking robotic rehabilitation system designed to assist individuals with tremors in improving their daily activities. Tremors, characterized by uncontrollable rhythmic movements, significantly hinder individuals in their day-to-day tasks. SPINDLE aims to address this issue and enhance the quality of life for affected individuals. This innovative system offers advanced technology to support those with tremors and help them regain autonomy.

news.headline: Dash reveals exclusive Amazon Prime Day deals with lowest prices ever on kitchenware must-haves, including cookware and tools from Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian. New York, June 28, 2024.
news.summary: In July, individuals passionate about cooking can take advantage of significant discounts on high-quality cookware, utensils endorsed by Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian, and additional items! On June 28, 2024, in New York, Dash revealed its surprise announcement for exclusive deals on Amazon Prime Day, creating anticipation for the upcoming shopping extravaganza.

news.headline: Astar Network reveals plans for Yoki Rewards program to boost user engagement and platform growth.
news.summary: Astar Network has unveiled its plans for the Yoki Rewards program, with the goal of boosting user engagement and fostering platform expansion. This initiative is set to involve a comprehensive strategy to incentivize users through rewarding activities. The program aims to enhance user experience and promote active participation within the platform. Through this initiative, Astar Network aims to increase user retention rates by 15% and expects a 20% growth in platform users within the next quarter.

news.headline: Goods prices fell by 0.4%, services prices rose by 0.2% in the latest BEA PCE Report.
Online course on Smart Packaging & Electronic Patient Information, Nov 4-5, 2024. Learn about e-PIL & SMART initiatives.
news.summary: Dublin – A training course titled "Smart Packaging and Electronic Patient Information" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This conference aims to educate participants on existing technologies, the advantages they bring to patients and society, as well as essential components for introducing and implementing e-PIL and SMART strategic programs. Attendees can expect to gain insights into the potential impacts on organizations from the growing utilization of SMART technologies.

news.headline: International Paper (NYSE: IP) to release Q2 2024 earnings on July 24, 2024, before NYSE opens. Webcast at 10am.
news.summary: International Paper, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker IP, is set to disclose its second-quarter 2024 financial results on July 24, 2024. This news will be shared prior to the commencement of trading on the NYSE. To delve deeper into their earnings and the prevailing market circumstances, the company is planning to conduct a webcast starting at 10:00 AM on the same day.

news.headline: Power Life's High Impact Whey Protein Powder promotes muscle health with increased protein intake, released on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Introducing Power Life™ High Impact Whey Protein, a specially formulated protein powder aimed at nourishing muscles, enhancing strength, and aiding in the retention of lean muscle mass. Released on June 28, 2024 in Los Angeles, this whey-based protein supplement is designed to support muscle health and boost protein levels effectively.

news.headline: Agility partners with Clinch for ad serving and DCO tech, aiming for precise, effective ad experiences.
news.summary: A recent collaboration is utilizing precision advertising, marketing science, performance creative, and dynamic creative optimization to enhance ad experiences for Agility's clients. This partnership aims to provide more relevant and effective advertising. The company involved, Clinch, specializes in dynamic ad serving. The initiative was announced on June 28, 2024, in New York. The collaboration seeks to optimize ad campaigns for Agility's clients and improve overall marketing effectiveness.

news.headline: Controller & Chief Accounting Officer at Associated Banc-Corp, Tammy Stadler, 58, retires on July 15, 2024. (Characters: 112)
news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin on June 28, 2024, Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) revealed that Tammy C. Stadler, aged 58, serving as Executive Vice President, Corporate Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer, will be stepping down from her roles on July 15, 2024. Stadler has decided to retire from these positions after her tenure.

news.headline: Mistral Inc. starts producing THOR UAS in Nottingham, Maryland. Also manufactures MTGR ground robot.
news.summary: Mistral Inc. has initiated production of the THOR Unmanned Aerial System (UAS) VTOL Group 2 in Nottingham, Maryland. This state-of-the-art facility now adds the innovative aerial system to its portfolio alongside the MTGR ground robot. The company is excited to expand its manufacturing capabilities and contribute to the UAV market from this location.

news.headline: Allspring Closed-End Funds in Charlotte declare monthly distributions for EAD, ERC, and ERH funds on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Three funds, namely the Allspring Income Opportunities Fund with the ticker symbol EAD, the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund with the ticker symbol ERC, and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund with the ticker symbol ERH, recently declared distributions. This announcement was made in Charlotte, N.C. on June 28, 2024, through PRNewswire. The funds are listed on the NYSE American exchange.

news.headline: Travelex Insurance Services applauded by Gallup for strengths-based culture. Industry-leading provider focuses on positive workplace environment.
news.summary: In June 28, 2024, in Omaha, Nebraska, recent studies have revealed the significant connection between workplace culture and employee engagement since 2016. Travelex Insurance Services, a prominent travel insurance provider, was already ahead in fostering a positive workplace culture. This early initiative has led to notable improvements in employee engagement and productivity.

news.headline: Nevro Corp. (NYSE: NVRO) grants new employees under NYSE Rule 303A.08 on June 7, 2024 in California.
news.summary: On June 7, 2024, Nevro Corp, a leading medical device company based in Redwood City, California, disclosed that its Compensation Committee approved a significant decision. The Committee, belonging to the Company's Board of Directors, made this announcement. Nevro Corp, listed on the NYSE as NVRO, is renowned for providing innovative solutions for managing chronic pain and improving lives globally.
